Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 38}While exploring, your periphery may occasionally become shrouded in a darkness known as the {f 0 1 2}Dark Zone{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}With your vision obscured, you'll need to use your map to find your way around. Fortunately, {f 0 1 2}enemies can't detect you either{f 0 1 27}, so you can take your time looking for the stairs to the next floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 39}{f 0 1 2}Breakable objects{f 0 1 27} are also guaranteed to contain a {f 4 4 0 37 1 16667}, so don't be deterred by the darkness and take your time exploring.[n]{f 1 1}
